question_text: What is a moment in physics?

options.label: A
options.text: A very short amount of time

options.label: B
options.text: The turning effect of a force about a pivot

correct_answer: The turning effect of a force about a pivot
explanation: A moment (or torque) describes how effectively a force causes rotation around a pivot point. It depends on both the size of the force and how far it is from the pivot.
